message:
feat(analytics): plan-attributed token rollups + Track B cost breakdown routing

Schema v13 adds plan_content_tokens_est_total and plan_api_tokens_total
columns to usage_hourly and usage_daily tables, enabling attribution of
token spend specifically to planning phases of agent sessions.

Storage layer changes:
- Plan heuristic v2: restricts detection to assistant/agent roles only,
  requires explicit plan headers near top of message, demands structured
  steps (numbered or bullets), and filters out tool-output blobs that
  previously caused false positives. Includes curated corpus threshold
  tests with recall >= 80% and FP rate <= 20%.
- AnalyticsRollupAggregator now tracks plan_content_tokens_est_total
  (all plan messages) and plan_api_tokens_total (only api data source
  rows) separately, matching the distinction between estimated and
  actual API usage.
- CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION bumped 11→13, SCHEMA_VERSION 12→13.

Analytics query changes:
- query_breakdown now routes EstimatedCostUsd metric through Track B
  (token_daily_stats) for Agent and Source dimensions, since cost data
  only exists there. Workspace dimension stays on Track A (cost will
  read as 0.0 — documented acceptable limitation).
- Exported UnpricedModel and UnpricedModelsReport types from analytics
  module for downstream consumers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
